subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God that the Sun of Universal Religion hath dawned. From all parts of the world host after host enter under its Radiance. Erelong it will become world-wide.
subcodes.subjects: @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i, @universality of the Cause, @growth of the Cause, @entry by troops, @Manifestation of God as sun
